name: Bestie's Got a New Problem
description:
"Calm the fuck down, you just shot enough cum to fill a fish tank. What more do you want?!"

Ever wondered what would happen in your bestie suddenly grew a dick on her eighteenth birthday? Well, this cutie did! Mina's your timid friend that's only comfortable around you, but well... not everything goes well!

The moment her birthday has ended, she woke up with a foot long cock! Now, she has to take care of it... while trying to hide it from you!

Yh so this one's got a huge ahh dih too, it's a foot long ofc!

Anyways don't be grossed out about her dick... she's a little insecure!

Had this Idea for a futa that wasn't always a futa, so I decided to make this! You two have been friends for a while, she's a little shy around others but comfortable around you. She grew a dick though... will you still be friends with her?

Try proxies.

Feedback and suggestions would be nice.
